title: Ubiquiti UA-Intercom, door intercom with keyboard
category: Ubiquiti / Cameras, security / Videophones and bells / Door Bells
description: UA-Intercom is a brand new high-end video intercom suitable for both indoor and outdoor use (operating temperature -30°C to +60°C), ideal for controlling entrances to residential and commercial buildings Intercom combines robust and durable construction with advanced features to ensure safe and convenient access. This intercom allows unlocking access using a variety of methods, - NFC card, UniFi Identity mobile app, PIN code or QR code , giving you the flexibility to choose your preferred method Thanks to the built-in address book and doorbell function, visitors can easily communicate with users who can grant them entry. One intercom can also be connected to several home video phones, so even installation in apartment buildings is not an obstacle Its easy installation and Power over Ethernet (PoE) power supply via the UA-Hub enable implementation in existing and new systems. UA-Intercom is designed to meet demanding requirements for reliability and performance, providing safety and convenience for users Improve your access control and communication system with UA-Intercom from Ubiquiti - the combination of security, convenience and modern technology in your building Unlocking with NFC card, UnFI Identity mobile application, PIN code or QR code Directory and doorbell to request entry Connection to UniFi Access Hub, powering via POE Durable design for indoor or outdoor use Touch screen Integrated camera Two-way audio Intercom Wall mount Drilling template Mounting kit
specsSearch: Camera Illumination White light Viewing Angle [°] 79 Image Max. resolution [pixels] 3264 x 2448 Connectors and Interfaces Audio Microphone, Speaker Power Power over Ethernet 48V DC Power type PoE Max. power consumption [W] 13
